title: The Padarthas (Categories of Existence)
description: Introduction to the categories of reality: Substance, Quality, and Action.

title: The Attributes of the Elements
description: Examination of the distinct sensory markers of Earth, Water, Fire, Air, and Ether.

title: The Proof of the Soul and Mind
description: Logical derivation of the conscious self and the internal organ of attention.

title: The Physics of Atoms and Perceptibility
description: Analysis of eternal sub-atomic realities, compounding laws, and the mechanics of visual perception.

title: Kinetics, Dynamics, and Motion
description: Foundational laws of mechanics, action (Karma), force transmission, and natural phenomena.

title: The Ontology of Virtue, Duty, and Action
description: An examination of scriptural execution, the mechanics of giving, and the rule-based results of moral choices.

title: The Ontology of Attributes and Dimensions
description: An investigation into property transformations under heat, atomic dimensions, and the metrics of space.

title: The Epistemology of Perception and Cognition
description: An investigation into how cognitive awareness is constructed, the mechanics of sensory data processing, and the structure of conceptual knowledge.

title: The Ontology of Non-Existence and Inference
description: An investigation into the measurable states of non-existence (Abhāva), structural causal boundaries, and the mechanics of logical inference.

title: The Ultimate Synthesis of Causation and Soul Attributes
description: The final philosophical synthesis exploring the mechanics of pleasure and pain, the physics of efficient causes, and the validation of universal cosmic order.
